description: Original tasks before rewriting based on actual data

tasks.name: Request a quote for two 2‑player basketball arcade machines under $8,000 each
tasks.description: Find 2‑player basketball arcade machines, filter to units under $8,000, select the two cheapest models, and submit a quote request so the quote cart contains exactly 2 different 2‑player basketball games, each priced below $8,000.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
In the main navigation, hover over the 'Products' menu and click on the 'Basketball & Sports Games' category.
In the sidebar filters, open the 'Players' filter and select the '2 players' checkbox.
Open the 'Price' filter, set the maximum price field to '8000', and apply the price filter.
Use the sort dropdown above the product grid to select 'Price: Low to High'.
Click on the first product card in the filtered list to open its product detail page, then click the 'Add to quote' button.
Use the browser back button or the breadcrumb link to return to the basketball games list, then click on the second product card in the list to open its detail page.
On the second product detail page, click the 'Add to quote' button.

Click the quote cart icon or 'View quote list' link in the header, then click the 'Proceed to quote request' button and fill out the quote form with your name, company, and email before clicking 'Submit quote request'.

tasks.name: Create a 4‑machine mixed-category project list for a compact 110V arcade
tasks.description: Build a project list with exactly 4 machines: 1 racing simulator, 1 ticket redemption game, 1 prize crane, and 1 air hockey table. All machines must operate on 110V power and be no wider than 130 cm. Add these four to a single 'Project' or 'Wish list' on the site.
steps: From the homepage, click on the 'Products' menu and select the 'Racing & Driving' category.
In the sidebar, open the 'Power' or 'Voltage' filter and select the '110V' option, then open the 'Width' filter and set the maximum width to '130 cm'.
From the filtered racing results, click the first product card and on the product detail page click the 'Add to project' or 'Add to wish list' button.
Return to the homepage via the logo, then navigate to the 'Ticket Redemption Games' category from the 'Products' menu.
Apply the same filters by selecting '110V' under power/voltage and setting maximum width to '130 cm', then open the first product and add it to the same project/wish list.

Use the main navigation to go to the 'Prize Cranes & Merchandisers' category, apply the '110V' and 'max 130 cm width' filters again, open the second product in the filtered results, and add it to the project/wish list.

Navigate to the 'Air Hockey & Table Games' category from the 'Products' menu, filter to '110V' power and maximum width '130 cm', then open the first air hockey table result and add it to the project/wish list.

Click on the project or wish list icon/link in the header and open it to ensure you are viewing the consolidated list, then click 'Save project' or the equivalent button to store the list with all four selected machines.

tasks.name: Find and download the latest installation manual for a specific crane machine model
tasks.description: Locate the support resources for the 'Galaxy Claw Pro' crane machine, filter documents to installation manuals published in 2023 or later, and download the most recent installation manual PDF for that model.
steps: On the homepage, click on the 'Support' or 'Resources' item in the main navigation.
In the support section, click on the 'Manuals & Downloads' or similarly labeled link.
In the search field within the downloads page, type 'Galaxy Claw Pro' and run the search.
Use the document type filter to select only 'Installation Manual' from the available document types.
Use the date or year filter to limit results to documents from '2023' and '2024' (or select 'Last 2 years' if that is the available option).
Sort the filtered results by 'Newest first' using the sort dropdown above the document list.
Click on the first result titled 'Galaxy Claw Pro Installation Manual' to open its detail or download view.
Click the 'Download PDF' button or link for this manual to start the download.

tasks.name: Book an on-site maintenance visit for an air hockey table on a specific date and time
tasks.description: Submit a service request for an 'Air Storm Hockey' table installed at a bowling center, choosing an on-site visit on June 10, 2026 at 10:00 AM and describing a puck detection issue.
steps: From the homepage, open the main navigation and click on the 'Service & Support' or 'Technical Support' link.
On the support page, click the 'Request Service' or 'Book Maintenance' button to open the service request form.
In the form, select 'On-site maintenance' from the 'Service type' dropdown menu.
Open the 'Product category' dropdown, choose 'Air Hockey & Table Games', then use the 'Model' dropdown to select 'Air Storm Hockey'.
In the location or venue field, type 'StrikeZone Bowling, 123 Main Street' as the installation location.
Click on the date picker field and select 'June 10, 2026' from the calendar, then use the time dropdown to select '10:00 AM'.
In the problem description text area, type 'Right goal is not detecting pucks and score is not updating.'
Fill in the contact fields with your name, phone number, and email address, check any required consent or terms checkbox, and click the 'Submit service request' button.

tasks.name: Find a Berlin-based distributor and send them a contact request
tasks.description: Use the dealer locator to find an authorized distributor located in Berlin, Germany, open their profile, and send a message through the onsite contact form to inquire about ordering claw machines.
steps: On the homepage, click on the 'Where to Buy' or 'Find a Distributor' link in the main navigation or footer.
On the locator page, use the region dropdown to select 'Europe' and the country dropdown to choose 'Germany'.
In the city or postal code search field, type 'Berlin' and click the search or 'Find dealers' button.
Zoom or scroll the results list and click on the first distributor entry that shows a Berlin address or is located in Berlin on the map.
On the distributor's detail page, click the 'Contact this distributor' or 'Send inquiry' button to open the contact form for that partner.
In the subject or topic field, select 'Product inquiry' or the closest available option from the dropdown.
In the message text area, type 'I am interested in pricing and availability for claw machines for a new arcade in Berlin.'
Fill in your name and email address in the contact fields and click the 'Send message' or 'Submit inquiry' button.

tasks.name: Register for a 15‑minute product demo slot at an upcoming trade show
tasks.description: Find an upcoming trade show event listed on the site, open its detail page, and use the embedded registration form to book a 15‑minute demo slot on the earliest available day of the event at 2:00 PM.
steps: From the homepage, click on the 'News & Events' or 'Events' section in the main navigation.
On the events listing page, use any available filter to show only 'Upcoming' events and scroll until you see the first trade show event that includes on-site demos in its description.
Click on that trade show event title to open its event detail page.
On the event detail page, locate and click the 'Book a demo' or 'Schedule a demo' button to open the demo registration form.
In the date selection field, choose the first (earliest) day listed for the event from the dropdown or calendar.
In the time slot dropdown, select '2:00 PM' as your preferred time for the demo.
Fill in your name, company, and email address into the respective form fields.
Select your area of interest (e.g., 'Prize cranes' or 'Family entertainment centers') if such a dropdown is present, then click the 'Register for demo' or 'Submit' button.

tasks.name: Choose the financing plan with the lower monthly payment for an $18,000 machine
tasks.description: Use the website’s financing calculator to compare 36‑month and 48‑month plans for a machine priced at $18,000 and select the plan with the lower monthly payment as your preferred option.
steps: On the homepage, open the main navigation and click on the 'Financing' or 'Leasing Options' page.
On the financing page, find and click the 'Financing calculator' or 'Estimate payments' tool.
In the calculator, enter '18000' into the equipment price or total amount field.
In the term field, select '36 months' and click the 'Calculate' or 'Update' button to display the estimated monthly payment.
Change the term field to '48 months' and click 'Calculate' or 'Update' again to show the new monthly payment.
Click the 'Compare plans' or similar tab if available, ensuring both 36‑month and 48‑month options are visible together.
Identify which of the two displayed plans (36 or 48 months) has the lower monthly payment and click the 'Select plan' or 'Request this plan' button under that option.
On the short financing inquiry form that appears, fill in your name, company name, and email, and click the 'Submit financing inquiry' button.

tasks.name: Subscribe to the newsletter with specific market segments and monthly frequency
tasks.description: Sign up for the company newsletter, selecting only 'Family Entertainment Centers' and 'Bowling Centers' as interests, and set the subscription frequency to 'Monthly' before submitting the form.
steps: From any page, scroll to the footer and click on the 'Newsletter' or 'Stay Updated' link.
On the newsletter signup page, click in the name field and enter your full name.
Click in the email field and type 'user@example.com' as the email address.
In the market segments or interests section, check only the 'Family Entertainment Centers' and 'Bowling Centers' checkboxes, leaving other segments unchecked.
Open the 'Email frequency' or 'How often should we contact you?' dropdown and select 'Monthly'.
If there is a checkbox for accepting the privacy policy or terms, check it.
Optionally type 'Updates on new redemption and crane games for FECs and bowling centers' into any available comments or preferences field.
Click the 'Subscribe', 'Sign Up', or equivalent button to complete the newsletter registration.
